summary: Tested 3 new features: Gallery Restore button, Auto-Backup Schedule toggle, and backend 404 isolation. All tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified working: (1) Gallery backup/restore buttons side-by-side with correct data-testids, (2) auto-backup-off/daily/weekly toggles functional with bg-indigo-600 highlighting, (3) 'First backup will run shortly' message shown when daily selected with no prior backup, (4) timer hides when switched to off, (5) /api/sync/nonexistent_user_123 returns 404.
